next_steps: Serum vitamin B12, folate, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry, cytogenetics, and iron staining
Peripheral blood flow cytometry for PNH clones (CD55 and CD59)
Serum haptoglobin, free hemoglobin, and LDH isoenzymes
Serum ferritin, soluble CD25, and NK-cell activity (to evaluate for HLH)
Antinuclear antibody (ANA) and direct antiglobulin test (DAT) subtyping
